title: Bookings and Cookbooks

seo.title: Bookings and Cookbooks - Marinda Kook
seo.description: Marinda regularly does appearances at women's mornings, boards and other functions. She also offers private cooking demonstrations. Contact her for a booking.

html:
I like people. I really like people a lot, and that's why it's such fun to spend time with them in all kinds of ways.

It's a great pleasure to appear at functions, social gatherings, women's mornings, team-building sessions, kiddies' workshops, judging potjiekos competitions and conferences. There's usually a lovely relaxed atmosphere.

I'm also regularly a speaker at women's mornings or mother-and-daughter mornings. I chat and motivate. We laugh and we cry. We talk about weight and about all our hang downs that a push-up bra can't even lift anymore. I assure them that as long as they don't weigh more than their fridge, they're still doing fine. My newest talk is: My Milk Boils Over. What pushes us women into the red, and how we deal with it.

I also have the privilege of appearing at boards, where I chat with professional people and try to push their boundaries. Schools book me to give motivational talks for staff. To me, there's little difference between a rut and a grave. Both are a place of rest and comfort. You should do something every day that scares you a little.

Businesses book me for team-building sessions. We bake bread, make pizzas or cook a whole meal. It's a lovely activity to ensure a healthy atmosphere in the workplace.

With my new children's cookbook now on the shelves: Marinda's Children's Kitchen with Chef Salt and Prof Pretzel I visit schools and do workshops with the learners. They enjoy it and I develop skills in them without them even realising it.

Marinda se Koskas is my new cookbook for grown-ups, and I bring it along to my talks. I do demos from the book or I challenge two members of the audience to make the recipe just by listening to me. At the end I see whose end result comes closest to the picture. It causes a lot of laughter and consternation.

These days the public books me for smaller, more intimate functions. I turn up at their homes and cook the guests a meal of their choice in their own kitchen. They sit around me and learn while I cook. We drink wine, chat and eat together.

If you're interested in booking me for an appearance, contact marindakook@gmail.com.

Book me for:

  • Women's days
  • Potjiekos judging
  • Kiddies' workshops
  • Team-building for businesses
  • Mother-and-daughter mornings
  • Intimate functions where we all cook together

Cookbooks

My cookbooks are available at Takealot, Loot, Exclusive Books and all good bookstores.

Buy Marinda se Koskas at Takealot, Loot or Exclusive Books.

Buy Marinda se Kinderkombuis met Sjef Sout en Prof Pretzel at Takealot, Loot or Exclusive Books.
